full_text:
Gongsha Lu 公沙盧
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsha Lu (公沙盧)was born in Beihai. Head of a powerful local clan, he defied local authority. Killed by Wang Xiu.
